home.description: The engine of innovation in society. An ecosystem focused on democratizing the power of technology.

presentations.title: Presentations
presentations.card_desc_1: The first official presentation: The engine of innovation in society. Discover how Reactivando breaks the bubble and brings technology to everyone.

login.welcome_subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue innovating.
login.unified_access_desc: Use your Hub Community login to access the Reactivando platform.
login.kinetic_desc: Join the network that is redefining the innovation ecosystem through collaboration and cutting-edge technology.

landing.hero_title: Fueling the Next Wave of Tech Innovation.
landing.hero_desc: Reactivando is the definitive community for technology professionals evolving into high-impact entrepreneurs. We bridge the gap between code and commerce.
landing.evolution_title: From React Masters to Global Innovators.
landing.evolution_desc1: We started with a single focus: mastering the world's most popular UI library. But we quickly realized that technical brilliance is only half the equation for changing the world.
landing.evolution_desc2: Today, Reactivando has evolved. We aren't just developers; we are architects of the future, blending deep engineering expertise with the strategic mindset of successful startup founders.
landing.pillar_desc: The foundation of every member's journey through our ecosystem.
landing.pillar1_desc: Deep-dive technical mastery that goes beyond frameworks. We build scalable, resilient systems that form the backbone of modern business.
landing.pillar2_desc: Cultivating a culture of continuous questioning. We use design thinking and product psychology to solve real-world problems uniquely.
landing.pillar3_desc: Turning code into companies. We provide the mentorship and frameworks necessary to launch and scale profitable tech ventures.
landing.cta_desc: Get your questions answered and discover the perfect plan for your current moment.
landing.footer_desc: The Kinetic Intelligence. Empowering the next generation of tech-driven entrepreneurs through community, mentorship, and elite education.

cadastro.desc: Join the largest network of technical innovators and entrepreneurs. Your journey starts here, integrated with the entire Hub Community ecosystem.
cadastro.form_subtitle: Start your integration into the global ecosystem.
cadastro.hub_warning: Your registration will be processed and managed by the Hub Community. Use the same credentials to access our entire ecosystem at hubcommunity.io.
